description: Intent resolution: heartbeat-driven proactive behavior — wakes, checks state, decides who to reach out to.

conversation.text: Have an agent proactively monitor our on-call rotation for burnout signs — who's been paged, when, how often — and suggest coverage shifts before it becomes a problem.

intentExpectation.rationale: Heartbeat-driven proactive behavior — wakes, checks state, decides who to reach out to.
